items.title: Redeploying Fable 5
items.original_summary: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布 Fable 5 将于 7 月 1 日全球重新部署，同时联合 Amazon、Microsoft、Google 等 Glasswing 伙伴提出行业级 jailbreak 严重度评分框架。这是模型可用性恢复 + 安全政策提案，没有新 API 字段或 SDK 改动。相对此前的差异是 Fable 5 从受限回归到全量可用，但需关注配套的安全评分是否影响红队评估流程。
items.backend_focus: 关注行动：此前因合规 hard-stop 切走 Fable 5 流量的服务，可在 7 月 1 日后逐步回切至 claude-fable-5 模型端点；同步评估新 jailbreak 评分框架是否影响自家 red-team 脚本。

items.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
items.original_summary: Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharin...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 5，定位 coding、agent 与企业级专业工作负载的前沿性能；同批宣布 Claude Science（科研工作台）和 Claude Tag（团队协作产品）上线。这是新一代主力模型 + 两条产品线更新，相对 Sonnet 4.x 在 coding/agent 维度有提升，未在摘要中披露 context window、max_tokens 或工具调用字段变化。已有 Sonnet 4 系统短期不强制迁移，但 Sonnet 5 通常会成为新默认。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把 model 字段切换为 claude-sonnet-5 即可在 Messages API 试用；先在 staging 跑 eval 确认 Tool Use、MCP、response_format 行为兼容，再决定是否在生产替换 Sonnet 4。

items.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most of
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  ten use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our inst...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 上线 Claude Science，面向科学家的可定制 AI 工作台，集成常用工具与软件包并产出可审计的工件，支持灵活的算力资源调度。这是垂直场景产品而非通用 API，没有新增 Messages API 字段或 SDK。相对此前的差异是首次给科研场景做独立产品化封装，科研方向团队可单独评估。
items.backend_focus: 仅科研团队相关：如做 AI for Science，可申请 Claude Science 试用替代自建 RAG+工具编排链路；通用业务后端无需改动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product   Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking proce...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，作为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。这是面向协作场景的产品功能，没有公开新的 Messages API 字段、工具调用协议或 SDK 变更。相对此前的差异是把团队工作流做成独立产品形态，API 层兼容性未知。
items.backend_focus: 关注行动：留意官方后续是否开放 Claude Tag 的 API；若仅是 UI 产品，后端无需集成；目前先观望不改动任何代码。

items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府要求暂停访问 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 发布声明，确认已按合规要求执行 hard-stop。这是合规事件而非产品升级，没有新 API 字段或模型能力变化。对此前已使用 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的调用方，需立即切换至其他模型。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把所有调用 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的请求切到备用模型（如 claude-sonnet-5 或 haiku 系列），避免线上 hard-stop；同步在告警里加一段针对 4xx-policy 的 fallback 逻辑。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期《Anthropic Public Record》透明度报告，属于公司治理与披露内容，不涉及模型、API、SDK 或定价变更。和工程无关，团队无需跟进。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，团队无需改动任何代码或配置。
